name: Dirge of the Great Hegemon
description: Fallen Hegemon's shattered legions. Bereaved thralls controlled by Plague Knights.
add_rules: The Executor: Must include 1 Executor (Plague Knight profile with LEADER, TOUGH). +10d for Broken Crown.
The Fallen: Cannot include Lord of Tumours.
The Bereaved: Grail/Fly Thralls become 'Bereaved' — cannot activate normally. Controlled by Hegemon's Will.
Hegemon's Will: Plague Knights can issue commands (Charge/Fight/Move/Shoot) to Bereaved within 8".
Dishonoured: Cannot have Mercenaries or any items costing Glory.
Hegemon's Last Blessing: Putrid Shotguns Limit: 3. Heavy Weapons lose Limit restrictions.
Locus of Despair: Executor's activation — all models within 8" (friend and foe) take Risky Success Roll.

abilities: Plague Knight with LEADER and TOUGH.
Broken Crown: +10d. Locus of Despair aura.
